name: magearna
flavor_text: This artificial Pokémon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak.

moves.name: sonic-boom
moves.effect: Inflicts 20 points of damage.

moves.name: defense-curl
moves.effect: Raises user’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: lucky-chant
moves.effect: Prevents the target from scoring critical hits for five turns.

moves.name: rollout
moves.effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, resetting after five turns.

moves.name: magnetic-flux
moves.effect: Raises the Defense and Special Defense of all friendly Pokémon with plus or minus by one stage.

moves.name: gear-up
moves.effect: Raises the Attack and Special Attack of all friendly Pokémon with plus or minus by one stage.

moves.name: mirror-shot
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: aurora-beam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: mind-reader
moves.effect: Ensures that the user’s next move will hit the target.

moves.name: lock-on
moves.effect: Ensures that the user’s next move will hit the target.

moves.name: shift-gear
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage and its Speed by two stages.

moves.name: crafty-shield
moves.effect: Protects all friendly Pokémon from non-damaging moves.

moves.name: synchronoise
moves.effect: Hits any Pokémon that shares a type with the user.

moves.name: zap-cannon
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: heart-swap
moves.effect: User and target swap stat changes.

moves.name: fleur-cannon
moves.effect: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.

moves.name: trump-card
moves.effect: Power increases when this move has less PP, up to a maximum of 200.

moves.name: agility
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: aura-sphere
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: baton-pass
moves.effect: Allows the trainer to switch out the user and pass effects along to its replacement.

moves.name: body-slam
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: brick-break
moves.effect: Destroys Reflect and Light Screen.

moves.name: calm-mind
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack and Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: charge-beam
moves.effect: Has a 70% chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: confide
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: confuse-ray
moves.effect: Confuses the target.

moves.name: dazzling-gleam
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: disarming-voice
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: double-team
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: draining-kiss
moves.effect: Drains 75% of the damage inflicted to heal the user.

moves.name: echoed-voice
moves.effect: Power increases by 100% for each consecutive use by any friendly Pokémon, to a maximum of 200.

moves.name: eerie-impulse
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages.

moves.name: electro-ball
moves.effect: Power is higher when the user has greater Speed than the target, up to a maximum of 150.

moves.name: electroweb
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: embargo
moves.effect: Target cannot use held items.

moves.name: encore
moves.effect: Forces the target to repeat its last used move every turn for 2 to 6 turns.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: energy-ball
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: explosion
moves.effect: User faints.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: false-swipe
moves.effect: Cannot lower the target’s HP below 1.

moves.name: flash-cannon
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: focus-blast
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: frustration
moves.effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: grass-knot
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage to heavier targets, with a maximum of 120 power.

moves.name: gravity
moves.effect: Disables moves and immunities that involve flying or levitating for five turns.

moves.name: guard-swap
moves.effect: User swaps Defense and Special Defense changes with the target.

moves.name: gyro-ball
moves.effect: Power raises when the user has lower Speed, up to a maximum of 150.

moves.name: heavy-slam
moves.effect: Power is higher when the user weighs more than the target, up to a maximum of 120.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: hidden-power
moves.effect: Power and type depend upon user’s IVs.  Power can range from 30 to 70.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: ice-beam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: imprison
moves.effect: Prevents the target from using any moves that the user also knows.

moves.name: iron-defense
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.

moves.name: iron-head
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: light-screen
moves.effect: Reduces damage from special attacks by 50% for five turns.

moves.name: metal-sound
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.

moves.name: misty-terrain
moves.effect: For five turns, protects all Pokémon on the ground from major status ailments and confusion, and halves the power of incoming dragon moves.

moves.name: pain-split
moves.effect: Sets the user’s and targets’s HP to the average of their current HP.

moves.name: play-rough
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: power-swap
moves.effect: User swaps Attack and Special Attack changes with the target.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: psybeam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: psychic
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: psyshock
moves.effect: Inflicts damage based on the target’s Defense, not Special Defense.

moves.name: reflect
moves.effect: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: return
moves.effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: round
moves.effect: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.

moves.name: self-destruct
moves.effect: User faints.

moves.name: shadow-ball
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: skill-swap
moves.effect: User and target swap abilities.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: snore
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: solar-beam
moves.effect: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.

moves.name: speed-swap
moves.effect: Exchanges the user’s Speed with the target’s.

moves.name: spikes
moves.effect: Scatters Spikes, hurting opposing Pokémon that switch in.

moves.name: steel-beam
moves.effect: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up.

moves.name: stored-power
moves.effect: Power is higher the more the user’s stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: sunny-day
moves.effect: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.

moves.name: swagger
moves.effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.

moves.name: swift
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: take-down
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: thunder-wave
moves.effect: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: thunderbolt
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: tri-attack
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

moves.name: trick
moves.effect: User and target swap items.

moves.name: trick-room
moves.effect: For five turns, slower Pokémon will act before faster Pokémon.

moves.name: volt-switch
moves.effect: User must switch out after attacking.

moves.name: zen-headbutt
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: after-you
moves.effect: Makes the target act next this turn.

moves.name: heal-bell
moves.effect: Cures the entire party of major status effects.

moves.name: last-resort
moves.effect: Can only be used after all of the user’s other moves have been used.

moves.name: magnet-rise
moves.effect: User is immune to Ground moves and effects for five turns.

moves.name: shock-wave
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: signal-beam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: steel-roller
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

abilitiesDetailed.name: soul-heart
abilitiesDetailed.effect: This Pokémon's Special Attack rises by one stage every time any Pokémon faints.
